scope.evidenceBoundary: Readiness contract only for coverage-guided claims; the fixed-seed local smoke does not prove coverage-guided fuzzing, sanitizer coverage proof, edge-growth proof, or provider-complete claim.

sourcePreflight.evidenceBoundary: Source preflight only for target-shape claims; the fixed-seed local smoke does not prove coverage-guided fuzzing, sanitizer coverage, crash, or edge-growth evidence.

toolchainRequirements.nativeRuntime: source-built libsvn/APR/bridge with sanitizer coverage instrumentation

blockers: Source-built libsvn/APR/bridge sanitizer coverage instrumentation has not been proven.
The fixed-seed smoke gate is not a coverage-guided fuzz run and does not prove edge growth.
nonClaims: This gate is a local fuzz readiness contract, not a coverage-guided fuzz run.
This gate records a local cargo-fuzz build and fixed seed execution requirement, not a coverage-guided campaign.
This gate does not prove sanitizer coverage, libsvn edge growth, crash discovery, or provider-complete remote-protocol fuzzing.
This gate does not close SEC-016, TST-020, NATIVE-REMOTE-FUZZ-001, or public release readiness.
